attributes.name: COMPETITOR
attributes.description: Competitor the user is migrating FROM (e.g. chatgpt, claude, gemini)

attributes.name: PRIMARY_USE_CASES
attributes.description: Comma-separated use cases from Exodus quiz (e.g. writing,research,coding)

attributes.name: USAGE_FREQUENCY
attributes.description: How often they used the competitor tool (multiple_times_daily, once_a_day, etc.)

attributes.name: HAD_CUSTOM_CONFIG
attributes.description: True if they had custom instructions/templates configured

attributes.name: MAIN_FRUSTRATION
attributes.description: Single frustration that drove the switch (e.g. no_memory, too_generic)

attributes.name: MIGRATION_STATUS
attributes.description: Current migration state: not_started | in_progress | complete

attributes.name: MIGRATION_PROFILE
attributes.description: Full JSON profile from portal analysis (topics, style, count, date range)

attributes.name: CONVERSATION_COUNT
attributes.description: Total conversations imported from previous AI tool

attributes.name: TOP_TOPICS
attributes.description: Comma-separated top 5 topics extracted from conversation history

MIGRATION_LEADS.name: PureBrain Migration Leads
MIGRATION_LEADS.description: All migration intent contacts — general pool regardless of competitor

CHATGPT.name: PureBrain Migration — ChatGPT
CHATGPT.description: Migration drip for users switching from ChatGPT/OpenAI. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

CLAUDE.name: PureBrain Migration — Claude
CLAUDE.description: Migration drip for users switching from Claude/Anthropic. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

GEMINI.name: PureBrain Migration — Gemini
GEMINI.description: Migration drip for users switching from Gemini/Google. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

PERPLEXITY.name: PureBrain Migration — Perplexity
PERPLEXITY.description: Migration drip for users switching from Perplexity. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

MIDJOURNEY.name: PureBrain Migration — Midjourney
MIDJOURNEY.description: Migration drip for users switching from Midjourney. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

COPILOT.name: PureBrain Migration — Copilot
COPILOT.description: Migration drip for users switching from Microsoft Copilot. Trigger: Contact added to this list.

UNKNOWN.name: PureBrain Migration — Other
UNKNOWN.description: Migration drip for users switching from other/unknown tools. Trigger: Contact added to this list.
